attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.ACCTS_PAY_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.AMOUNT_APPLICABLE_TO_DISCOUNT, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.AMOUNT_PAID,
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.AMT_DUE_CCARD_COMPANY, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.AMT_DUE_EMPLOYEE, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.APPROVAL_ITERATION, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.APPROVAL_READY_FLAG,
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.APPROVED_AMOUNT, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.AWT_GROUP_ID,
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.BASE_AMOUNT, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.CANCELLED_AMOUNT, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.CANCELLED_BY, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.CANCELLED_DATE, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.CREATED_BY, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.CREATION_DATE,
replace(replace(replace(MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.DESCRIPTION,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ,chr(234),'e')DESCRIPTION, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT_TAKEN,
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.EARLIEST_SETTLEMENT_DATE, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.EXCHANGE_DATE, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.EXCHANGE_RATE, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE,
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.EXCLUSIVE_PAYMENT_FLAG, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.FREIGHT_AMOUNT, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.GLOBAL_NAME, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.GL_DATE, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.GOODS_RECEIVED_DATE, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.INVOICE_AMOUNT,
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.BATCH_ID,
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.INVOICE_DATE, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.INVOICE_ID, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.INVOICE_NUM, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.INVOICE_RECEIVED_DATE, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.INVOICE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.MRC_BASE_AMOUNT, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.MRC_EXCHANGE_DATE, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.MRC_EXCHANGE_RATE, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.MRC_EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.ORG_ID,
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.ORIGINAL_PREPAYMENT_AMOUNT,
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.PAYMENT_CURRENCY_CODE, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.PAYMENT_METHOD_LOOKUP_CODE, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.PAYMENT_STATUS_FLAG, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.PAY_CURR_INVOICE_AMOUNT,
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.PAY_GROUP_LOOKUP_CODE, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.POSTING_STATUS, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.PO_HEADER_ID, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.RECURRING_PAYMENT_ID, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.REQUESTER_ID, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.SOURCE, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.TAX_AMOUNT, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.TEMP_CANCELLED_AMOUNT, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.TERMS_DATE, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.TERMS_ID, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.VAT_CODE, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.VENDOR_ID, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.VENDOR_PREPAY_AMOUNT, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.VENDOR_SITE_ID, 
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.VOUCHER_NUM,
MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.WFAPPROVAL_STATUS 
FROM  MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL 
WHERE  MF_AP_INVOICES_ALL.GES_UPDATE_DATE>TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
